name: Change Default Image Settings
body: [{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Steps"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to the "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " page."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Search for and select "}, {"text": "Image Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the "}, {"text": "Image Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": " page, you can change dimensions of images, quality and number of images to display on your webstore at any given time."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ChangeDefaultImageSettings.05T5g00000xpZ6QEAU.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ChangeDefaultImageSettings.05T5g00000xpZ6QEAU.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image1", "width": 700, "height": 336}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Change the number of images that display per product"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Modify the number in the "}, {"text": "Number of images per product", "bold": true}, {"text": " field."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Change the default image size"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Change the number in the corresponding "}, {"text": "width/height", "bold": true}, {"text": " field."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
